title: Mibao Door Mats Indoor, Doormat 40 x 60 Cm Black Grey, Washable Door Matts Indoor, Heavy Duty Non-slip Entrance Mat, Super Absorbent Front Door Mat
features: Indoor Outdoor Use: Our door mats indoor has strength at following several aspects: ABSORBENT, ANTI-SLIP, WASHABLE, DIRT SCRAPE, DURABLE. This magic mats can be used as interior doormat or as an exterior door mat for an doorstep, hallway, entryway, kitchen, bedroom,patio, stoop, threshold or porch.

Dirt Catching: The door mats indoor powerfully catch dirt so that it doesn't end up on your floors or in your carpets. Our Barrier Mat make a surprised effect when you have a fur pet. Super easy to clean, just rinse it in water and let it dry, comes like a new mat

Non-slip: More than a Dirt Trapper. This Absorbent entrance mat also soaks up moisture like a sponge to keep the area clean & dry on rainy days. No more puddles or slippery entrance. While ordinary floor mats are thin and flimsy; our heavy-duty floor mats are high quality and designed with non-slip technology, making them perfectly stable on all surfaces, preventing any slipping accidents

Fashion Style: Mibao door mats indoor made strong from high quality polypropylene fibers and superior rubber. Better material brings a longer using time. 5 colors with simple style adapt any scene whatever indoors or outdoors. Perfect choice for residential homes, commercial properties & businesses.

Low Profilr Design: Mibao Doormat with low threshold design, the perfect thickness absolutely convenient for you to open or close the door. But never worry about this thin door mat have bad quality, our natural rubber backing ensures this floor mat is very durable and heavy duty instead of others.

Freeze Resistant: The difference between our mats from others is that our mats use a natural rubber bottom, which can still be durable in the cold winter, so good materials last longer, our doormats allowing you to save more
Better Mat: Available in multiple sizes and attractive colors, Mibao offers the perfect and most premium outdoor and indoor mat, staying functional throughout all seasons and weather conditions.
